signals.headline: Bosnia and Herzegovina confirmed as Switzerland's Group B opponent in 2026 FIFA World Cup** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2
signals.raw:
Bosnia and Herzegovina confirmed as Switzerland's Group B opponent in 2026 FIFA World Cup** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][5]

The UEFA Playoff A winner—previously listed as undecided (e.g., Wales, Bosnia and Herzegovina, Italy, Northern Ireland)—has been resolved as Bosnia and Herzegovina, completing Group B: Canada (co-host), Bosnia and Herzegovina, Qatar, and Switzerland[1][2][4][5]. This finali
matched_markets: Will Switzerland win Group B in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
